goal: Close 12 shared blockers identified in gap analysis. Unblock ~40+ functions.

milestones.title: Closure seen-set bug
milestones.description: Fix _autodiscover_closure_deps! seen-set bug that skips direct deps (filter, sort, sum) during compilation. 5 LOC fix.

stories.title: Verify closure seen-set bug with reproduction test
stories.completedNote: Bug confirmed: filter skipped during compilation, only resize! compiled. Shared seen set is root cause.

stories.title: Fix seen-set bug: separate compiled set from collection seen set
stories.completedNote: 7 LOC fix: fresh compiled set from func_registry before compilation loop. filter/sort/sum now compiled.

stories.title: Verify filter/sort/sum closures pass end-to-end
stories.completedNote: 4 new tests in Phase 68. 1731 pass (+4), 0 regressions.

milestones.title: contains/occursin
milestones.description: Wire contains/occursin to work via _searchindex autodiscovery or str_contains intrinsic. ~50 LOC.

stories.title: Trace contains compilation failure path
stories.completedNote: contains/occursin ALREADY WORK. Gap analysis misdiagnosed — test harness can't marshal JS strings to WasmGC refs. _searchindex early dispatch fires correctly.

milestones.description: Wire _base in invoke.jl for string interpolation. ~10 LOC.

milestones.description: Fix stack balancing in Dict setindex! loop codegen. ~30 LOC.

stories.title: Trace Dict loop insert stack validation error
